integrations.footnote: Tokens are encrypted at rest and scoped to your account. Disconnect anytime — Sylk keeps no copies after that.

projectBuilder.projectNameNeededBody: Add a project name first so the AI knows what to suggest for.
projectBuilder.saveFirstBody: Add a project name and client first so the document has somewhere to attach.
projectBuilder.couldNotOpenLinkBody: Failed to generate a viewing link.
projectBuilder.couldNotOpenAppBody: No app available to view this file.
projectBuilder.unlinkEstimateBody: This project will no longer be linked to that estimate.
projectBuilder.contractAmountRequired: Contract amount must be greater than 0.
projectBuilder.atLeastOnePhaseRequired: At least one phase is required.
projectBuilder.invalidDatesBody: Start date cannot be after end date.
projectBuilder.projectLimitReachedBody: Upgrade your plan to create more projects.
projectBuilder.saveFailedCreateBody: Couldn't create the project — check your connection and try again. Your work on this screen is preserved.
projectBuilder.somePhasesFailedBody: Some phases didn't save. Open the project and retry from Edit Project.
projectBuilder.saveFailedGenericBody: Something went wrong saving the project. Your draft is still here — try again in a moment.
projectBuilder.phasesNoBudget: One or more phases have no budget assigned.
projectBuilder.budgetMismatchDetail: Phase budgets total ${{allocated}} but the contract is ${{contract}}.
projectBuilder.drawsIntro1: Big jobs aren't paid all at once. Instead you bill the homeowner in chunks ("draws") as you finish milestones — deposit, foundation, rough-in, drywall, final, and so on. Skip this for small jobs you'd bill with one invoice.
projectBuilder.drawsIntro2: Once turned on, you'll get a "Send draw" button on the project page for each milestone — tap it when the work is done and an invoice goes out.
projectBuilder.retainageHelp: The homeowner holds back this percent from every draw payment until the project is fully done — a safety deposit so contractors don't skip the punchlist. Industry standard: 10%. Set 0 if you don't want any.
projectBuilder.percentModeHelp: Scales with the contract — change orders flow through automatically.
projectBuilder.fixedModeHelp: Flat dollar amount, ignores contract changes. Good for fixed deposits.
projectBuilder.triggerPhaseHelp: When you mark a phase as done, this draw auto-flags as ready and you get a notification.
projectBuilder.addPhaseFirst: Add a phase in the Phases section first, then come back here.
projectBuilder.triggerProjectStartHelp: Use this for deposits — fires the moment the project becomes active.
projectBuilder.triggerManualHelp: Use only for unusual cases (bank-driven inspections, etc.). Your daily briefing will list it so you don't forget.
projectBuilder.noWorkers: No workers yet — invite some from the Workers screen.
projectBuilder.checklistItemPlaceholder: e.g. Site clean at end of day
projectBuilder.documentsLockedHelp: Tap Create Project below, then come back here to upload contracts, plans, permits, or photos.
projectBuilder.documentsEmptyHelp: Upload contracts, plans, permits, or photos.
